creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: rm
Date: Thu Feb 13 13:43:36 2014
New Revision: 344105
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/344105
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r344105/

Log:
  - update to 1.0.7
  - support staging
  
  PR:		186666
  Submitted by:	Jose Garcia Juanino <jjuanino@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile
  head/databases/powerarchitect/distinfo
  head/databases/powerarchitect/pkg-plist

Modified: head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile	Thu Feb 13 13:41:53 2014	(r344104)
+++ head/databases/powerarchitect/Makefile	Thu Feb 13 13:43:36 2014	(r344105)
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	powerarchitect
-PORTVERSION=	1.0.6
+PORTVERSION=	1.0.7
 CATEGORIES=	databases java
 MASTER_SITES=	GOOGLE_CODE
 DISTNAME=	SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-${PORTVERSION}
@@ -14,41 +14,31 @@ LICENSE=	GPLv3
 
 OPTIONS_DEFINE=	ORACLE_JDBC MYSQL_JDBC PGSQL_JDBC
 
+ORACLE_JDBC_RUN_DEPENDS=	${JAVALIBDIR}/ojdbc-10.2.0.5.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/jdbc-oracle10g
+MYSQL_JDBC_RUN_DEPENDS=	${JAVALIBDIR}/mysql-connector-java.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/mysql-connector-java
+PGSQL_JDBC_RUN_DEPENDS=	${JAVALIBDIR}/postgresql.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/postgresql-jdbc
+
 USE_JAVA=	yes
 
 JAVA_VERSION=	1.6+
 
 NO_BUILD=	yes
 
+PORTDOCS=	*
 PROJECTHOST=	power-architect
 DATADIR=	${JAVASHAREDIR}/${PORTNAME}
 WRKSRC=		${WRKDIR}/architect-${PORTVERSION}
 SUB_FILES=	${PORTNAME}
 
-NO_STAGE=	yes
-.include <bsd.port.options.mk>
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MORACLE_JDBC}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${JAVALIBDIR}/ojdbc-10.2.0.5.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/jdbc-oracle10g
-.endif
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MMYSQL_JDBC}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${JAVALIBDIR}/mysql-connector-java.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/mysql-connector-java
-.endif
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MPGSQL_JDBC}
-RUN_DEPENDS+=	${JAVALIBDIR}/postgresql.jar:${PORTSDIR}/databases/postgresql-jdbc
-.endif
-
 do-install:
-	@${MKDIR} ${DATADIR}/jdbc
-	@cd ${WRKSRC}/ && \
-	    ${INSTALL_DATA} architect.jar ${DATADIR}/ && \
-	    ${INSTALL_DATA} jdbc/sqlserver_2005.jar ${DATADIR}/jdbc/ && \
-	    ${COPYTREE_SHARE} lib ${DATADIR}
-	@${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME} ${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
-
-.if ${PORT_OPTIONS:MDOCS}
-	@${MKDIR} ${DOCSDIR}
-	@${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/README.generic ${DOCSDIR}
-.endif
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}/${DATADIR}/jdbc
+	(cd ${WRKSRC}/ && \
+	    ${INSTALL_DATA} architect.jar ${STAGEDIR}/${DATADIR}/ && \
+	    ${INSTALL_DATA} jdbc/sqlserver_2005.jar ${STAGEDIR}/${DATADIR}/jdbc/ && \
+	    ${COPYTREE_SHARE} lib ${STAGEDIR}/${DATADIR})
+	${INSTALL_SCRIPT} ${WRKDIR}/${PORTNAME} ${STAGEDIR}/${PREFIX}/bin/${PORTNAME}
+
+	@${MKDIR} ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}
+	${INSTALL_MAN} ${WRKSRC}/README.generic ${STAGEDIR}/${DOCSDIR}
 
 .include <bsd.port.mk>

Modified: head/databases/powerarchitect/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/powerarchitect/distinfo	Thu Feb 13 13:41:53 2014	(r344104)
+++ head/databases/powerarchitect/distinfo	Thu Feb 13 13:43:36 2014	(r344105)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-1.0.6.tar.gz) = 26f03b6b5dc88007e9d6740bfc50a30a3248cee5c5da4a52bf272a88ea72e831
-SIZE (SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-1.0.6.tar.gz) = 23492992
+SHA256 (SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-1.0.7.tar.gz) = e88f90ce238a35d31db5fb6c0677a056d0bd850970f6e6261cf867fc996bf378
+SIZE (SQL-Power-Architect-generic-jdbc-1.0.7.tar.gz) = 23833112

Modified: head/databases/powerarchitect/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/databases/powerarchitect/pkg-plist	Thu Feb 13 13:41:53 2014	(r344104)
+++ head/databases/powerarchitect/pkg-plist	Thu Feb 13 13:43:36 2014	(r344105)
@@ -49,8 +49,6 @@ bin/powerarchitect
 %%DATADIR%%/lib/velocity-1.6.2.jar
 %%DATADIR%%/lib/velocity-tools-generic-1.4.jar
 %%DATADIR%%/lib/xercesImpl-2.9.1.jar
-%%PORTDOCS%%%%DOCSDIR%%/README.generic
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/lib
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%/jdbc
-@dirrm %%DATADIR%%
-%%PORTDOCS%%@dirrm %%DOCSDIR%%
+@dirrmtry %%DATADIR%%/lib
+@dirrmtry %%DATADIR%%/jdbc
+@dirrmtry %%DATADIR%%
